normalized_text:
Employee Leave and Time Off Policy
Annual Leave Rules
- Full-time employees receive annual leave based on tenure band and local employment terms.
- Leave requests should be submitted in advance and approved by the direct manager unless local emergency leave rules apply.
- Unused leave may carry over only within the limits shown below.

Carryover chart and table
- 0-2 years: 15 annual leave days, 5 carryover cap
- 3-5 years: 20 annual leave days, 7 carryover cap
- 6+ years: 25 annual leave days, 10 carryover cap

Manager and Employee Responsibilities
- Managers should balance team coverage with fair access to approved leave.
- Employees should review their remaining leave balance before submitting a request.
- Questions about personal leave balance should be answered only for the authenticated employee.
